scene.message: Want to hear how it works?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Heeho-kun: Heeho!{waitkey}{ret}
Trade for your Sealing Tool?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Hihoko-chan: You sure?{waitkey}{ret}
No regrets?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Heeho-kun: Heeho!!{nl} Here's our trade then.{waitkey}Here, the "Rosetta Stele"!{waitkey}{ret}
Got the "Rosetta Stele"!{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: So those two have{nl} been following us, huh.{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: I'll gratefully{nl} take it.{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: I already got{nl} my share.{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: You sure it's me?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Yukino: You're the leader.{nl} I'll follow your call.{waitkey}{ret}
You're really sure?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Got the "Buffalo Beats"!{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Got it, for sure.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: He's totally{nl} under her thumb, huh.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Ayase got her share.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Why's it a stuffed{nl} animal~? The worst!!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Sealing Tools are{nl} valuable, right?{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Is it okay to take it?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Ayase: Tch!!{waitkey}{ret}
Yay~ Really?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Got the "Stuffed Deer"!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: He's got it rough{nl} too, that one.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Yamaoka...{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Yamaoka...{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: I trust you know,{nl} but Ambrosia is precious.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: You'll trade for{nl} mine, then?{ctl0e:0}{ret}
Nanjo: I'll leave this{nl} to your judgment.{waitkey}{ret}
Then I'll take it.{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Got the "Tortoiseshell{nl} Glasses"!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Those Demons{nl} don't seem hostile.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: I'll take the{nl} Sealing Tool.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Thank you!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Are you sure it's me?{ctl0e:0}{ret}
Elly: Please think it{nl} over carefully.{waitkey}{ret}
Are you quite certain?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Got the "Contract of{nl} Judgment"!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Thank you!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: I sense the sorrow{nl} of a man~{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Yeah~! Score,{nl} score!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Yeah~! Score,{nl} score!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: I'll take mine.{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Brown: Last chance to{nl} reconsider.{waitkey}{ret}
Well, that settles it.{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Got the "Victoria Rune"!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Dehyahya!{waitkey}A nice bourgeois-sounding{nl} name, just right for me.{waitkey}{ret}
